short_summary: Iran deal progress; China espionage friction
rationale: Iran deal incremental steps (UAE unfreezing funds, Hormuz reopening signal) and congressional pushback are the most US-relevant developments, alongside a new China espionage incident adding friction to US-China relations.

top_events.title: Iran deal signals: Hormuz reopening, UAE unfreezing funds, congressional resistance
top_events.summary: Incremental Iran deal progress with UAE unfreezing funds and Hormuz reopening signals, but a US Congressman warns against money flows to Iran — reflecting active domestic political tension over a deal that could affect oil markets and US Middle East posture.

top_events.title: China arrests US academic at conference for espionage
top_events.summary: China's detention of a US academic on espionage charges is a new friction point in US-China relations, raising concerns for Americans traveling to or engaging with China professionally.

top_events.title: Elon Musk becomes world's first trillionaire as SpaceX debuts on stock market
top_events.summary: SpaceX's stock market debut drives Musk's net worth past $1 trillion — a notable financial market event with potential implications for US investor sentiment and tech sector dynamics.
